channel.title: Comments on: Episode 8 – Genesee Cream Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.description: Hi to all, We are enjoying this site and the personal touch Paul has brought to the subject. Thank you, Kendra and Bud
item.content:encoded: Hi to all, We are enjoying this site and the personal touch Paul has brought to the subject. Thank you, Kendra and Bud
